Arthur D. Little study: AI will transform development and engineering, organizations must reshape themselves for success.
news.summary: In London, it has been reported that the integration of artificial intelligence (AI) will bring about significant changes in development and engineering operations. To achieve success in this endeavor, companies must undergo a restructuring process. This shift towards AI is expected to have a substantial impact on the way organizations operate.

news.headline: Broadband Forum in Calif. renewing focus on services-led broadband with 5 new work areas to meet user demands.
news.summary: In Fremont, California, Broadband Forum has restructured its focus to prioritize projects and specifications that support user-demanded services and intelligent broadband. The organization's revamped work areas, now totalling five, will address access networks, connected users, subscriber networks, network architecture, cloud and autonomous networks, and service requirements, all aimed at driving the development of key applications and services. This shift will ensure a sharper emphasis on meeting user needs and promoting innovative broadband solutions.

news.headline: Wintermute set to open a New York office, aiming for growth in OTC and derivatives. CEO sees potential in Trump's crypto-friendly approach.
news.summary: Wintermute, a company specializing in cryptocurrency, is set to expand its operations in the US with the opening of a new office in New York. CEO Evgeny Gaevoy expressed confidence in this move, attributing it to the favorable crypto policies expected under the Trump administration. This decision reflects Wintermute's strategic vision to capitalize on the growing interest in digital currencies.

news.summary: Solar A/S is scheduled to conduct its Annual General Meeting on Friday, March 14, 2025, starting at 11:00 am. The meeting venue is located at Industrivej Vest 43, Vejen, Denmark (postal code: 6600).

news.headline: MFH's subsidiary Aifinity Base Ltd to produce liquid cooling solutions for Nvidia® chip-powered AI data centers.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on Feb. 19, 2025, Mercurity Fintech Holding Inc. (MFH) disclosed the establishment of a majority-owned subsidiary named Aifinity Base Limited in Hong Kong. Aifinity aims to produce specialized liquid cooling panels designed for artificial intelligence (AI) infrastructure, high-performance computing (HPC), with a focus on enhancing the efficiency and performance of Nvidia® chip-powered GPUs and other high-performance AI accelerators. The Company, listed on Nasdaq under the ticker MFH, is venturing into this expansion to cater to the growing demand for technological advancements in AI and computing sectors.

news.summary: Changpeng "CZ" Zhao, the founder of Binance, has announced plans to donate surplus cryptocurrency he received to aid the victims of the LIBRA scam.

Carvana to report Q4 earnings of 29 cents/share, revenue $3.31B; shares closed at $284.53, down 0.3%. Wall Street forecasts positive outlook for the company.
news.summary: Carvana Co. (NYSE:CVNA) is set to announce its Q4 financial results on Feb. 19, 2025, after market close. Analysts are predicting earnings of 29 cents per share, contrasting with a $1.00 loss per share in the same period last year. The company is expected to report quarterly revenue of $3.31 billion, up from $2.42 billion a year ago. Carvana has surpassed revenue projections in the last three consecutive quarters and in five of the past ten quarters. On Tuesday, Carvana's stock saw a negligible decrease of 0.3%, closing at $284.53. For more details and the full story, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: DMEGC Solar in China wins EcoVadis Silver Medal for sustainability evaluation on Feb. 17, 2025 as part of Hengdian Group.
news.summary: In Jinhua, China, on February 17, 2025, DMEGC Solar, a PV module manufacturer under Hengdian Group, received the EcoVadis Silver Medal after undergoing a thorough assessment for corporate social responsibility. This internationally recognized award highlights the company's commitment to sustainability practices.

news.headline: Tickets for the FORMULA 1® ETIHAD AIRWAYS ABU DHABI GRAND PRIX 2025 are now on sale at Yas Marina Circuit.
news.summary: In Abu Dhabi, UAE, on February 19, 2025, Ethara has announced the commencement of ticket sales for the 2025 Formula 1® season's concluding event, the FORMULA 1® ETIHAD AIRWAYS ABU DHABI GRAND PRIX 2025. Fans are invited to secure their tickets to witness the exciting season climax at the renowned Yas Marina Circuit.

news.headline: CKGSB and Johns Hopkins University collaborate on AI-Driven Healthcare Innovation Program, launching on Feb. 19, 2025.
news.summary: On February 19, 2025, in Beijing, the Cheung Kong Graduate School of Business (CKGSB) and Johns Hopkins University's Carey Business School revealed the introduction of the groundbreaking AI-Driven Healthcare Innovation Program. This collaborative effort aims to support senior professionals and entrepreneurs in the healthcare sector.

LG Innotek showcases Nexlide at DVN Lighting Workshop in Munich, introducing 'Edge' and 'Vision' tech to European clients.
news.summary: Presenting at the DVN Lighting Workshop in Munich on February 19 and 20, is Nexlide, a cutting-edge product with innovative 'Edge' and 'Vision' technologies. Additionally, a roadshow for key European clients is being organized to introduce the product and pave the way for entrance into the European markets. This initiative comes from Seoul, South Korea, marking the beginning of the journey to target European markets.

news.headline: Dr. Aleix Prat named Chair of Advisory Board, Dr. Jutta Amersdorffer as CMO, and Stéphane Durant des Aulnois as CFO at Ona Therapeutics.
news.summary: Renowned expert in drug and biomarker development, Dr. Aleix Prat, has been appointed as the Chair of the Advisory Board. Dr. Jutta Amersdorffer has taken on the role of Chief Medical Officer, while Stéphane Durant des Aulnois has been named Chief Financial Officer. These key appointments are set to drive the acceleration of development efforts within the company.

news.headline: Global empty capsules market expected to reach USD 4.61 billion by 2034, growing at a CAGR of 5.26% with sales of approx. USD 2.98 billion in 2025.
news.summary: The global Empty Capsules Market is expected to grow significantly, with the market size valued at around USD 2.76 Billion in 2024, reaching USD 2.98 Billion in 2025, and projected to hit approximately USD 4.61 Billion by 2034 at a CAGR of 5.26%. This growth is driven by factors such as the rising demand for pharmaceuticals, ease of ingestion, and higher bioavailability compared to oral tablets. Gelatin capsules held the majority market share in 2024 at 73.5%, with North America leading with 34.7% market share. Non-gelatin capsules, especially popular in vegetarian and vegan products, are expected to grow at a fast pace. The report covers market trends, size, segmentation by type, functionality, application, and region, with a forecast period from 2025 to 2034.

news.headline: HUTCHMED to announce 2024 final results on Mar 19, 2025 at 7:00 am EDT/11:00 am GMT/7:00 pm HKT.
news.summary: Hutchmed (China) Limited, listed on Nasdaq/AIM under HCM and SEHK under 13, is set to disclose its year-end results for 2024 on March 19, 2025. The announcement will be made at 7:00 am EDT, 11:00 am GMT, and 7:00 pm HKT. The company operates in Hong Kong, Shanghai, and Florham Park, N.J.

Bitcoin bull market is set to endure $77K BTC price drop in 2025, assures CryptoQuant CEO; 30% dip won't trigger bear market.
news.summary: According to the CEO of CryptoQuant, Ki Young Ju, there is an expectation that Bitcoin will not experience a downturn into a bear market in 2025. Despite the possibility of a 30% decrease in the price of Bitcoin, Ju remains optimistic about the cryptocurrency's prospects.

news.headline: Sinch provides charging and policy control for NXTGN Digital MVNE in South Africa.
news.summary: In Stockholm on February 19, 2025, Sinch (Sinch AB (publ)), trading as XSTO: SINCH, is leading the transformation of global communication with its digital Customer Communications Cloud. The company offers essential real-time charging, policy control, and messaging solutions, contributing to its success.

news.headline: Hisense MEA unveils plans for expansion and innovative products at 2025 conference. Includes 136-inch Micro LED TV, 116-inch UX TV, Real Madrid co-branded products. New brand store in Egypt and plans for North Africa expansion.
news.summary: Cutting-edge product launches are revolutionizing home entertainment with the introduction of a massive 136-inch Micro LED TV and a 116-inch UX TV. These innovative offerings are setting new benchmarks in the industry. Additionally, the exclusive Real Madrid co-branded product line aims to enhance the sports viewing experience for fans. The inauguration of a brand store in Egypt is complementing the company's strategic expansion plans across North Africa, bolstering its regional footprint. The developments signify a significant push in the market's innovation and presence, with Dubai, UAE acting as a central hub for these transformative initiatives.

news.headline: SES deployed O3b mPOWER satellite to Viasat Energy Services’ APAC customer for high-performance connectivity on an offshore vessel, a first in the region.
news.summary: Luxembourg-based SES recently revealed the deployment of its O3b mPOWER system, the second generation of medium Earth orbit (MEO) satellites, to a client of Viasat Energy Services operating an offshore vessel in the Asia-Pacific region. Viasat Energy Services' initial utilization of MEO satellite technology in APAC and their first integration of O3b mPOWER services worldwide is significant. In late October 2024, the Offshore Energy mPOWERED system was successfully implemented on a Floating Production Vessel, marking a milestone in advanced satellite services for the energy sector.

news.headline: Princess Alexandra Hospital NHS Trust partners with Armis for cybersecurity, using AI-powered platform to manage cyber risks in real time.
news.summary: In London, cybersecurity company Armis has teamed up with The Princess Alexandra Hospital NHS Trust (PAHT) to enhance its cyber defense capabilities. Through Armis CentrixTM, PAHT is now equipped to safeguard its entire attack surface and swiftly address cyber risks in real-time. This partnership allows PAHT to provide top-tier patient care by using AI-powered technology to pinpoint and eliminate potential cybersecurity threats. By leveraging this platform, PAHT can detect and resolve security issues and vulnerabilities promptly.
